text_orig:
🦅Update via US Central Command:

🎯 The US has struck over 5,500 Islamist Terror Regime targets in Iran, including more than 60 ships.

🎯 All Iranian Soleimani-class warships have been destroyed. 

🎯 Yesterday, the US struck Iran nearly every hour.
text_en:
🦅Update via US Central Command:

🎯 The US has struck over 5,500 Islamist Terror Regime targets in Iran, including more than 60 ships.

🎯 All Iranian Soleimani-class warships have been destroyed. 

🎯 Yesterday, the US struck Iran nearly every hour.

text_orig:
🚨NEW: The IDF says Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir has ordered significant reinforcements to Israel’s northern front, shifting the Golani Brigade combat team from the south to Northern Command following a new operational assessment.

The move comes amid developments in operations against Iran and escalating threats from Hezbollah, which has joined the fighting on behalf of Iran’s terror regime.

The IDF says additional forces could be deployed depending on the evolving situation, and stresses it will continue operating with force to prevent any harm to Israeli civilians.
text_en:
🚨NEW: The IDF says Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir has ordered significant reinforcements to Israel’s northern front, shifting the Golani Brigade combat team from the south to Northern Command following a new operational assessment.

The move comes amid developments in operations against Iran and escalating threats from Hezbollah, which has joined the fighting on behalf of Iran’s terror regime.

The IDF says additional forces could be deployed depending on the evolving situation, and stresses it will continue operating with force to prevent any harm to Israeli civilians.
